title: RelativeRobotLocal Property
description:
This property sets the number of local coordinate system for the coordinate system that moves relatively.

It is used when specifying Relative in DestType and Local in RelativeOrient.

Values

0 (Base) Use the Local 0 coordinate system (Base coordinate system).

It is the same as when specifying Base in RelativeOrient

1 to 15 Use the Local coordinate system of the specified number.

Default:  0 (Base)

See Also: RelativeRobotLocal Property

RelativeOrient Property
